rawIntent: Add a padStart utility function at src/shared/utils/padStart.ts that exports padStart(s: string, length: number, char?: string): string — pads the beginning of a string to the specified length with the given character (default space)

successCriteria.description: The padStart function is correctly implemented and exported from src/shared/utils/padStart.ts.

constraints: Input validated at the API boundary: All request bodies validated with Zod (or equivalent) before reaching.
No sensitive data in logs: PII, tokens, passwords, and PCI/PHI data must never appear in log lines.
